notes: All 40 assertions passed across 5 test scenarios — 100% pass rate
The system prompt V7 handles all tested categories effectively: happy path, objections, edge cases, stress/DNC, and patience
Patience test (Eval 5) took longest at 65.7s — expected given the extended conversation with repetitions
Stress/DNC test (Eval 4) was fastest at 36.2s — short call ending quickly after DNC request
No baseline comparison run — this is a system prompt eval, not a skill A/B test
Caveat: These are simulated conversations where the same model plays both sides. Real caller behavior may surface gaps not caught here. Recommend testing with live calls or adversarial human testers.
